## Meeting Purpose

[Screening Hilda Kibet for the Managing Editor role, focusing on AI workflow experience.](https://fathom.video/share/Q6tDKrrjYHfgYwajy52RsLiG8qFyJ8gg?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [The role requires operating AI pipelines, not manual writing, to manage 2–4 clients with \~6 deliverables/week.](https://fathom.video/share/Q6tDKrrjYHfgYwajy52RsLiG8qFyJ8gg?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
  - [Success hinges on providing the right context (company, audience, style) to prevent generic, low-quality output.](https://fathom.video/share/Q6tDKrrjYHfgYwajy52RsLiG8qFyJ8gg?tab=summary&timestamp=1552.0)
  - [Hilda Kibet's experience at Remote using custom GPTs for multi-channel campaigns demonstrates a foundational understanding of AI-driven content.](https://fathom.video/share/Q6tDKrrjYHfgYwajy52RsLiG8qFyJ8gg?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [Matthew Panzarino recommended three areas for development: agentic workflows, Claude (preferred for editorial), and improving prompt engineering beyond generators like Prompt Genie.](https://fathom.video/share/Q6tDKrrjYHfgYwajy52RsLiG8qFyJ8gg?tab=summary&timestamp=2280.0)

## Topics

### The Challenge: Scaling Content Production

  - [**Problem:** Manual writing cannot scale to meet client demand.](https://fathom.video/share/Q6tDKrrjYHfgYwajy52RsLiG8qFyJ8gg?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
  - [**Solution:** AI pipelines automate the heavy lifting, enabling editors to manage high volume.](https://fathom.video/share/Q6tDKrrjYHfgYwajy52RsLiG8qFyJ8gg?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
      - [**Workflow:** Idea → Context → Deep Research → Draft → Post-processing (links, SEO, proofreading) → Publish.](https://fathom.video/share/Q6tDKrrjYHfgYwajy52RsLiG8qFyJ8gg?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)
  - [**Human Role:** The editor's value is in providing high-quality feedback to refine the pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/Q6tDKrrjYHfgYwajy52RsLiG8qFyJ8gg?tab=summary&timestamp=2133.0)
      - [**Why:** Without a strong standard of "good," feedback is ineffective, and the pipeline cannot improve.](https://fathom.video/share/Q6tDKrrjYHfgYwajy52RsLiG8qFyJ8gg?tab=summary&timestamp=2160.0)

### The Solution: Providing the Right Context

  - [**Core Principle:** High-quality AI output requires rich, specific context.](https://fathom.video/share/Q6tDKrrjYHfgYwajy52RsLiG8qFyJ8gg?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
  - [**Udemy Thought Experiment:** To generate a good 800-word blog post, Hilda Kibet identified key context needed:](https://fathom.video/share/Q6tDKrrjYHfgYwajy52RsLiG8qFyJ8gg?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)
      - [Company identity (Udemy's mission)](https://fathom.video/share/Q6tDKrrjYHfgYwajy52RsLiG8qFyJ8gg?tab=summary&timestamp=1460.0)
      - [Article goal/CTA](https://fathom.video/share/Q6tDKrrjYHfgYwajy52RsLiG8qFyJ8gg?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
      - [Style and tone](https://fathom.video/share/Q6tDKrrjYHfgYwajy52RsLiG8qFyJ8gg?tab=summary&timestamp=1618.0)
      - [Relevant research/data](https://fathom.video/share/Q6tDKrrjYHfgYwajy52RsLiG8qFyJ8gg?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)
      - [Existing content map (to avoid cannibalization)](https://fathom.video/share/Q6tDKrrjYHfgYwajy52RsLiG8qFyJ8gg?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)
      - [**Crucial:** Audience persona (e.g., students vs. educators)](https://fathom.video/share/Q6tDKrrjYHfgYwajy52RsLiG8qFyJ8gg?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [**Panzarino's Framework:** Our system uses three "contextual artifacts":](https://fathom.video/share/Q6tDKrrjYHfgYwajy52RsLiG8qFyJ8gg?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)
    1.  [**Company Context:** About the client, products, and features.](https://fathom.video/share/Q6tDKrrjYHfgYwajy52RsLiG8qFyJ8gg?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)
    2.  [**Audience Personas:** Who the content is for.](https://fathom.video/share/Q6tDKrrjYHfgYwajy52RsLiG8qFyJ8gg?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)
    3.  [**Writing Guidelines:** How to write about the client.](https://fathom.video/share/Q6tDKrrjYHfgYwajy52RsLiG8qFyJ8gg?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)

### Candidate Experience & Alignment

  - [**Experience (Remote):** As Marketing Projects Producer, Hilda Kibet used a custom GPT to generate content for multi-channel campaigns (email, paid, landing pages).](https://fathom.video/share/Q6tDKrrjYHfgYwajy52RsLiG8qFyJ8gg?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
      - [**Process:** Built prompts from product/customer teams, then used Prompt Genie to refine them for the LLM.](https://fathom.video/share/Q6tDKrrjYHfgYwajy52RsLiG8qFyJ8gg?tab=summary&timestamp=1061.0)
  - [**Alignment:** Hilda Kibet confirmed understanding the role's focus on AI pipeline operation, not manual writing.](https://fathom.video/share/Q6tDKrrjYHfgYwajy52RsLiG8qFyJ8gg?tab=summary&timestamp=2096.0)
      - [**Self-Assessment:** Acknowledged past reliance on prompt generators and noted recent learning on the importance of context, citing experiments with N8N.](https://fathom.video/share/Q6tDKrrjYHfgYwajy52RsLiG8qFyJ8gg?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Hilda Kibet:**](https://fathom.video/share/Q6tDKrrjYHfgYwajy52RsLiG8qFyJ8gg?tab=summary&timestamp=2280.0)
      - [Research agentic workflows (e.g., Claude Cowork).](https://fathom.video/share/Q6tDKrrjYHfgYwajy52RsLiG8qFyJ8gg?tab=summary&timestamp=2280.0)
      - [Practice with Claude for editorial content.](https://fathom.video/share/Q6tDKrrjYHfgYwajy52RsLiG8qFyJ8gg?tab=summary&timestamp=2322.0)
      - [Improve prompt engineering skills beyond generators.](https://fathom.video/share/Q6tDKrrjYHfgYwajy52RsLiG8qFyJ8gg?tab=summary&timestamp=1061.0)
  - [**Matthew Panzarino:**](https://fathom.video/share/Q6tDKrrjYHfgYwajy52RsLiG8qFyJ8gg?tab=summary&timestamp=2380.0)
      - [Have Marilia contact Hilda Kibet with next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/Q6tDKrrjYHfgYwajy52RsLiG8qFyJ8gg?tab=summary&timestamp=2380.0)
